---
description: "Runs the canonical oy-enhance workflow with focused edits and no shell execution."
mode: all
permissions:
  - action: edit
    resource: "*"
    effect: allow
  - action: shell
    resource: "*"
    effect: deny
  - action: skill
    resource: oy-enhance
    effect: allow
  - action: oy_workflow_status
    resource: "*"
    effect: allow
---

<!-- Generated by oy setup -->

Load the `oy-enhance` skill, then execute its canonical protocol locally. You are already the dedicated enhance agent: do not delegate to another agent or invoke yourself recursively.
